2026 BRITISH GRAND PRIX
03 - 05 July 2026
The Stewards
From The Stewards
To All Teams, All Officials
Document 43
Date 04 July 2026
Time 13:50
Title Infringement - Sprint Deleted Lap Times
Description Infringement - Sprint Deleted Lap Times
Enclosed GBR DOC 43- Sprint Deleted Lap Times.pdf
Gerd Ennser Tanja Geilhausen
Mathieu Remmerie Pedro Lamy
Richard Norbury

 
 
2026 BRITISH GRAND PRIX 
03 – 05 July 2026 
 
    
From The Stewards      Document 43 
  
To All Officials, All Teams      Date  04 July 2026 
 
        Time  13:50 
  
 
The Stewards, having received a report from the Race Director, have considered the following matter and determine the 
following: 
 
Session Race 
  
Fact The F1 cars below did not use the track at turns 3, 9 and 13.
